allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add custom Cbarrgs blackletter logo with bouncy animation

- Replace text title with custom blackletter logo \(spiked C design\)
- Invert to white with glowing drop shadow for visibility
- Add bouncy floating animation \(12px lift, 2% scale pulse\)
- Responsive sizing across breakpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --base main --head dev --title "UI/UX Refresh: Custom logo, animations, mobile polish" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- **Custom blackletter logo** with spiked C, white glow effect, bouncy animation
- **Mobile navigation polish** - animated hamburger menu, staggered link animations
- **Reduced grain overlay** - was too heavy, now subtle 1.5% opacity
- **Performance optimizations** - lazy loading routes, centralized social links data
- **Smooth animations** - floating effects, 3D card tilt, scroll-triggered reveals

## Changes
- Hero section: Custom logo replaces text, floating animation
- Mobile menu: Full-screen with backdrop blur, social icons
- All sections: Consistent Framer Motion animations
- Bundle: ~18KB smaller initial load via code splitting

## Test plan
- [ ] Desktop: Check logo visibility and animations
- [ ] Mobile: Test hamburger menu and navigation
- [ ] Performance: Verify smooth 60fps animations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.ai/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
